mapper.select: /* SQL ID : ApiDAO.selectApiTerm 설 명 : API 학기 조회 */ SELECT CRS_SMSTR_ID , DGRS_YR AS YEAR , DGRS_SMSTR AS SEMESTER FROM CRS_SMSTR WHERE SMSTR_STSCD = 'SERVICE' AND NOW_SMSTRYN = 'Y' AND ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND DGRS_YR <= (SELECT DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y'))

/* SQL ID : ApiDAO.selectTotProgressRatio 설 명 : 학부, 대학원 평균 진도율 */ WITH RATIO_T AS ( SELECT ROUND(100 * IFNULL(SUM(IFNULL(A.LRN_WKNO, 0)) / SUM(IFNULL(A.TOT_WEEK_CNT, 0)), 0), 2) AS TOTAL_PROG_RATIO , ROUND(100 * IFNULL(SUM(IFNULL(A.CMPL_WEEK_CNT_C, 0)) / SUM(IFNULL(A.TOT_WEEK_CNT_C, 0)), 0), 2) AS COLLEAGE_PROG_RATIO , ROUND(100 * IFNULL(SUM(IFNULL(A.CMPL_WEEK_CNT_G, 0)) / SUM(IFNULL(A.TOT_WEEK_CNT_G, 0)), 0), 2) AS GRAD_PROG_RATIO FROM ( SELECT A.USER_ID , SUM(A.LRN_WKNO) AS LRN_WKNO , SUM(IF(A.UNIV_CD = 'C', A.LRN_WKNO, 0)) AS CMPL_WEEK_CNT_C , SUM(IF(A.UNIV_CD = 'G', A.LRN_WKNO, 0)) AS CMPL_WEEK_CNT_G , SUM(A.TOT_WEEK_CNT) AS TOT_WEEK_CNT , SUM(IF(A.UNIV_CD = 'C', A.TOT_WEEK_CNT, 0)) AS TOT_WEEK_CNT_C , SUM(IF(A.UNIV_CD = 'G', A.TOT_WEEK_CNT, 0)) AS TOT_WEEK_CNT_G FROM TB_LMS_LRN_PRGRT A WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{year} AND A.CRS_ID = #{semester} AND A.SBJCT_ID NOT LIKE '%JLPT%' GROUP BY A.USER_ID ) A ) SELECT IFNULL((SELECT TOTAL_PROG_RATIO FROM RATIO_T), 0) AS TOTAL_PROG_RATIO , IFNULL((SELECT COLLEAGE_PROG_RATIO FROM RATIO_T), 0) AS COLLEAGE_PROG_RATIO , IFNULL((SELECT GRAD_PROG_RATIO FROM RATIO_T), 0) AS GRAD_PROG_RATIO

/* SQL ID : ApiDAO.selectTotCollProgressRatio 설 명 : 대학교 평균 진도율 */ SELECT ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(IFNULL(A.LRN_WKNO, 0)) / SUM(IFNULL(A.TOT_WEEK_CNT, 0)), 0) * 100, 2) AS COLLEAGE_PROG_RATIO FROM TB_LMS_LRN_PRGRT A WHERE A.UNIV_CD = 'C' AND A.SBJCT_ID NOT LIKE '%JLPT%' AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{year} AND A.CRS_ID = #{semester}

/* SQL ID : ApiDAO.selectTotGradProgressRatio 설 명 : 대학원 평균 진도율 */ SELECT ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(IFNULL(A.LRN_WKNO, 0)) / SUM(IFNULL(A.TOT_WEEK_CNT, 0)), 0) * 100, 2) AS GRAD_PROG_RATIO FROM TB_LMS_LRN_PRGRT A WHERE A.UNIV_CD = 'G' AND A.SBJCT_ID NOT LIKE '%JLPT%' AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{year} AND A.CRS_ID = #{semester}
mapper.insert: /* SQL ID : ApiDAO.insertStdAttendRatio 설 명 : 과목 주차별 학생 출석율 (통계) */ INSERT INTO TB_LEARNER_WEEK_PROG ( LEARNER_WEEK_PROG_ID /* 주차별진도율통계ID */ , SBJCT_ID /* 과정개설코드 */ , SBJCT_ID /* 개설년도 */ , CRS_ID /* 개설학기 */ , DVCLAS_NO /* 분반번호 */ , UNIV_CD /* 대학구분 */ , SBJCTNM /* 과정개설명 */ , USER_ID /* 사용자번호 */ , LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ /* 학습일정순서 */ , PRGRT /* 진도율 */ , FRST_INQ_DTTM /* 등록일 */ , MOD_DTTM /* 수정일 */ ) WITH STD_INFO AS ( SELECT TLCC.SBJCT_ID , TLCC.DEPT_CD , TLCC.SBJCT_ID , TLS.STD_ID , TLS.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT TLCC INNER JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT TLS ON TLCC.SBJCT_ID = TLS.SBJCT_ID INNER JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT THUL ON TLS.USER_ID = THUL.USER_ID AND THUL.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' AND TLS.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' /* 승인상태 */ AND TLS.AUDITYN = 'N' /* 청강생여부 */ AND TLS.ATNDLC_ABNDYN = 'N' /* 수강포기여부 */ AND TLS.ORG_ID = #{orgId} WHERE 1 = 1 AND TLCC.SBJCT_ID = YEAR(NOW()) ), LESSON_SCHEDULE AS ( SELECT SCH.* FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TLLS.SBJCT_ID , TLCC.SBJCTNM , TLCC.SBJCT_ID , TLCC.CRS_ID , TLCC.DVCLAS_NO , TLCC.UNIV_CD , TLLS.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , TLLS.LCTR_SCHDLNM , TLLS.LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ , CASE WHEN RPAD(TLT.DGRS_SMSTR, 2, '0') IN ('10', '20') AND TLLS.LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ = 8 THEN 'M' WHEN RPAD(TLT.DGRS_SMSTR, 2, '0') IN ('10', '20') AND TLLS.LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ = 15 THEN 'L' WHEN RPAD(TLT.DGRS_SMSTR, 2, '0') IN ('11', '21') THEN CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL WHERE SBJCT_ID = TLLS.SBJCT_ID AND DELYN = 'N') = 15 THEN CASE WHEN TLLS.LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ = 8 THEN 'M' WHEN TLLS.LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ = 15 THEN 'L' END WHEN TLLS.LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ = (SELECT MAX(LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ) FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL WHERE SBJCT_ID = TLLS.SBJCT_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN 'L' END END AS TKEXAM_TYCD , CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') < IFNULL(TLLS.LCTR_RCG_SYMD, LCTR_SYMD) THEN 'READY' WHEN DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') BETWEEN IFNULL(TLLS.LCTR_RCG_SYMD, LCTR_SYMD) AND IFNULL(TLLS.LCTR_RCG_EYMD, LCTR_EYMD) THEN 'PROGRESS' WHEN DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') > IFNULL(TLLS.LCTR_RCG_EYMD, LCTR_EYMD) THEN 'END' ELSE 'READY' END AS LESSON_SCHEDULE_PROGRESS FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL TLLS INNER JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT TLCC ON TLLS.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID INNER JOIN SBJCT_PROF TLCCTR ON TLCC.SBJCT_ID = TLCCTR.SBJCT_ID AND TLCCTR.PROF_TYCD IN ('PROFESSOR', 'ASSISTANT') INNER JOIN TB_LMS_TERM_CRE_CRS_RLTN TLTCCR ON TLCC.SBJCT_ID = TLTCCR.SBJCT_ID INNER JOIN CRS_SMSTR TLT ON TLTCCR.CRS_SMSTR_ID = TLT.CRS_SMSTR_ID AND TLT.ORG_ID = #{orgId} WHERE 1 = 1 AND TLCC.SBJCT_ID = YEAR(NOW()) ) SCH WHERE TKEXAM_TYCD IS NULL AND LESSON_SCHEDULE_PROGRESS IN ('PROGRESS', 'END') ) SELECT LEARNER_WEEK_PROG_ID , SBJCT_ID , SBJCT_ID , CRS_ID , DVCLAS_NO , UNIV_CD , SBJCTNM , USER_ID , LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ , PRGRT , DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d%H%i') , DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d%H%i') FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(LS.SBJCT_ID, IF (LENGTH(LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ) = 1, CONCAT('0', CAST(LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ AS CHAR(3))), CAST(LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ AS CHAR(3))), LSS.USER_ID) AS LEARNER_WEEK_PROG_ID , LS.SBJCT_ID , LS.SBJCT_ID , LS.CRS_ID , LS.DVCLAS_NO , LS.UNIV_CD , LS.SBJCTNM , LSS.USER_ID , LS.LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ , IF(LSS.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'COMPLETE' OR LSS.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'LATE', 100, 0) AS PRGRT FROM LESSON_SCHEDULE LS LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TLLSS.SBJCT_ID , TLLSS.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , TLLSS.STD_ID , TLLSS.USER_ID , TLLSS.ATNDLC_STSCD FROM TB_LMS_LESSON_STUDY_STATE TLLSS INNER JOIN STD_INFO SI ON TLLSS.STD_ID = SI.STD_ID ) LSS ON LS.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = LSS.LCTR_SCHDL_ID WHERE USER_ID IS NOT NULL ) A ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE PRGRT = A.PRGRT /* 진도율 */ , MOD_DTTM = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d%H%i') /* 수정일 */
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : ApiDAO.selectPreviewCnts 설 명 : 콘텐츠 미리보기 조회 */ SELECT A.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID , A.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID , A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , A.LESSON_TYPE_CD , A.LCTR_CONTSNM , A.LCTR_CONTS_SEQ , A.LCTR_CONTS_GBNCD , A.LESSON_CNTS_URL FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS A WHERE A.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = #{lessonCntsId}

/* SQL ID : ApiDAO.listPreviewLessonPage 설 명 : 콘텐츠 페이지 목록 조회 */ SELECT A.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID , A.PAGE_SEQNO , A.ULD_GBNCD , A.PAGENM , A.URL , A.VDO_MNTS , A.ATNDC_RFLTYN FROM SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_PAGE A WHERE A.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = #{lessonCntsId} ORDER BY A.PAGE_SEQNO*1

/* SQL ID : ApiDAO.selectTotalAsmntCount 설 명 : 학습활동 과제카운트 */ SELECT COUNT(1) AS COUNT_INFO FROM (
) A

/* SQL ID : ApiDAO.selectTotalForumCount 설 명 : 학습활동 토론카운트 */ SELECT COUNT(1) AS COUNT_INFO FROM (
) A

/* SQL ID : ApiDAO.selectTotalQuizCount 설 명 : 학습활동 퀴즈카운트 */ SELECT COUNT(1) AS COUNT_INFO FROM (
) A

/* SQL ID : ApiDAO.selectTotalReschCount 설 명 : 학습활동 설문카운트 */ SELECT COUNT(1) AS COUNT_INFO FROM (
) A

/* SQL ID : ApiDAO.selectTotalSeminarCount 설 명 : 학습활동 세미나카운트 */ SELECT COUNT(1) AS COUNT_INFO FROM (
) A

/* SQL ID : ApiDAO.selectAcademyAsmntCount 설 명 : 학습활동이력 과제카운트 */ SELECT COUNT(1) AS COUNT_INFO FROM (
) A

/* SQL ID : ApiDAO.selectAcademyForumCount 설 명 : 학습활동이력 토론카운트 */ SELECT COUNT(1) AS COUNT_INFO FROM (
) A

/* SQL ID : ApiDAO.selectAcademyQuizCount 설 명 : 학습활동이력 퀴즈카운트 */ SELECT COUNT(1) AS COUNT_INFO FROM (
) A

/* SQL ID : ApiDAO.selectAcademyReschCount 설 명 : 학습활동이력 설문카운트 */ SELECT COUNT(1) AS COUNT_INFO FROM (
) A

/* SQL ID : ApiDAO.selectAcademySeminarCount 설 명 : 학습활동이력 세미나카운트 */ SELECT COUNT(1) AS COUNT_INFO FROM (
) A
